commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Control UI support for extracting and rendering image blocks from streamed tool results and tool card output, with supporting styles, types, and regression tests.

PR surface: Source +152, Tests +214. Total +366 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. as a source-level reproduction: current main's tool card and live stream paths preserve text but not image blocks, while tool helpers emit structured image content. I did not run a live current-main repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed from this review; the remaining action is maintainer coordination between overlapping open PRs.

target.title: feat(ui): render image blocks in tool output cards
target.body:
## Summary
- Render `image` content blocks from tool results in Control UI tool cards.
- Preserve streamed tool result images as message-level image blocks so expanded tool details do not duplicate the same image.
- Rebased the PR onto current `main`; no dependency or lockfile changes are included.

## Real behavior proof
- **Behavior or issue addressed:** Tool output messages with `image` content blocks were invisible in Control UI tool cards, leaving image-producing tools with only their text output visible.
- **Real environment tested:** Linux x86_64, Node v22, current PR worktree `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/pr-87548`, dev gateway on `http://127.0.0.1:19048` with token auth.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:**
  - `pnpm exec vitest run ui/src/ui/app-tool-stream.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts`
  - `pnpm check:changed`
  - `OPENCLAW_REPO=/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/pr-87548 OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PORT=19048 OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN=pr87548token OPENCLAW_LOG=/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-pr-87548-evidence/dev-gateway-after-rebase.log OPENCLAW_DEV_PID_FILE=/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-pr-87548-evidence/dev-gateway.pid /media/vdc/code/ai/Hermes/scripts/dev-gateway-start.sh`
  - `pnpm exec tsx /media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-pr-87548-evidence/proof-tool-image-render.mjs`
- **Evidence after fix:**
  ```json
[
  {
    "id": "tool:call-image",
    "name": "image_gen.generate",
    "args": {
      "prompt": "chart"
    },
    "inputText": "{\n  \"prompt\": \"chart\"\n}",
    "outputText": "Generated image",
    "images": [
      "https://example.com/generated.png"
    ]
  }
]
  ```
  Control UI connected successfully after launching the current PR worktree gateway; screenshot captured at `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-pr-87548-evidence/control-ui-connected-after-rebase.png`.
- **Observed result after fix:** The extracted tool card contains `outputText: "Generated image"` and `images: ["https://example.com/generated.png"]`; the browser proof also confirms the rebuilt Control UI from this branch connects to the dev gateway.
- **What was not tested:** Did not invoke a live third-party image generation provider; the proof uses the same tool-result content shape that image-producing tools emit.

## Regression Test Plan
- **Target test file:** `ui/src/ui/app-tool-stream.node.test.ts`, `ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.node.test.ts`, `ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.test.ts`, `ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts`.
- Added coverage for streamed tool result images, nested image blocks inside tool results, direct rendering of multiple tool card images, managed outgoing URL filtering, and avoiding duplicate rendering for message-level streamed images.

## Root Cause
- **Root cause:** The tool card builder only extracted text from tool result content arrays and ignored `image` blocks, while streamed tool result images also needed to remain message-level content to avoid duplicating images inside expanded tool details.
